_comment: HUMAN-OWNED. Where each published figure came from, plus a sha256 of the exact file served. `pnpm check:figures` recomputes the hashes and fails if a figure changed without this record being updated — the site's copy of a paper figure cannot drift silently.
_limits: This verifies the file has not changed since it was recorded. It does NOT
re-run the paper's figure scripts — those live in a private repo with
untracked data. When a figure is regenerated, update `sha256` and `note`
in the same commit that replaces the image.

figures.note: Corrected build: the arXiv version renders a literal '95\%' in the y-axis label and footer. Regenerated 2026-07-19 after a two-line fix; verified no pixel inside any data panel changed.

figures.paperFigure: gravax preview run (N=512 EFF cluster, 3 crossing times)
figures.note: PRELIMINARY. gravax's own provenance.json records production_validated=false: this is a preview run, not a production-validated result. config sha256 dfed5f7e…, IC sha256 39d42ceb…, JAX 0.10.2, CPU, seed 2213.
PRELIMINARY. Truth-known experiment, 96 recovery mocks; hash-verified evidence bundles. Claims machine-checked against the run in the infoviz card.

figures.paperFigure: Synthetic LSST r-band images, sparse vs crowded
figures.note: PRELIMINARY. Shared forward model; PSF FWHM 0.7 arcsec, 0.2 arcsec/pix, 256^2 pix, d=6300 pc, Poisson-Gaussian noise, seeds 1 and 2.
PRELIMINARY. Generated with progenax; shown on /research and /software.
